Class SubscriberController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseReservationController
Controllers.SubscriberController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AvailableTimesListener
public class SubscriberController extends BaseReservationController
Controller for the Subscriber UI. Handles navigation, reservations, cancellations, and payment reminders.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Description copied from class: BaseReservationController
      Initializes the controller. Sets this controller as the active reservation controller and available times listener in the client. Adds a listener to the date picker to hide time selection when the date changes.
      Overrides:
      initialize in class BaseReservationController

    • getUserId

      public int getUserId()

    • onReservationsReceived

      public void onReservationsReceived(List<Reservation> reservations)
      Handles reservations received from the server. Shows cancellation popups for cancelled reservations. Shows payment reminder popups for reservations that are completed but had a payment reminder flag set.
      Parameters:
      reservations - list of reservations received from the server

    • showCancellationPopup

      private void showCancellationPopup(Reservation res)
      Displays a popup alert for a cancelled reservation and notifies the server that the subscriber has been informed.
      Parameters:
      res - the cancelled reservation

    • showPaymentReminderPopup

      private void showPaymentReminderPopup(Reservation res)
      Displays a reminder popup for a reservation that has been seated for over 2 hours and hasn't been paid.
      Parameters:
      res - the seated reservation
